race.comment: Open race to close out the card. HELLOVA NATURE (5) is putting together some solid results. Finished second at Tamworth two starts back then scored by 2 lengths as public elect last time out over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Hails from an astute barn and has the talent to take this out. ELECTRIC ARROW (12) did well to score at Ipswich two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when in contention on the corner before finishing second over 1200m at this track, beaten 2 lengths. Will enjoy a drop in class so she is a leading contender. TARPS (1) will enjoy the class drop from the city and was in winning form prior. TRIBBIANI (6) continued the good form from last campaign with a fresh win. Respect.
